eks.fargateprofile.selector.CfnAbout: An object representing an AWS Fargate profile selector.

eks.fargateprofile.selector.Labels.Description: The Kubernetes labels that the selector should match. A pod must contain all of the labels that are specified in the selector for it to be considered a match.

eks.fargateprofile.selector.Namespace.Description: The Kubernetes namespace that the selector should match.
